steps.title: Notice the redirection
steps.content: The passage admits that Kapteyn b may be habitable but says humanity probably cannot use it soon because it is 13 light-years away. The final sentence redirects attention to planets within our own solar system.

steps.title: Signal the substitute focus
steps.content: A signals similarity, B introduces an example, and C signals a next step in a sequence. The needed transition shows that because the distant planet is impractical, humanity should focus on a closer alternative. The answer is D.
